basic_details.job_title: TISS Medical Officer Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
basic_details.short_information: Tata Institute of Social Sciences (TISS) Medical Officer Notification 2026 has been released on the official website tiss.edu. A total of 1 vacancy has been announced through the TISS MEDICAL OFFICER Recruitment 2026.

age_limit.details: Maximum Age Limit: 55 years as on 31-03-2026. Age relaxation will be as per government rules.

qualification.details: MBBS recognized by MCI. Registered with MCI / State Medical Council. Three years of working experience in a hospital attached with a Medical College/Corporate Hospital. Desirable: Post Graduate Medical

how_to_apply: Applications must be submitted online on or before 15-05-2026.
To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section.
Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of TISS to complete the application.
Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details.
Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format.
Pay the application fee online, if applicable.
Review all details carefully before submitting the form.
Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the TISS MEDICAL OFFICER recruitment?
faq.answer: The last date to submit your online application for the TISS MEDICAL OFFICER position is 15th May 2026. It is advisable to complete the application process well before the deadline to avoid any last-minute technical issues.

faq.question: Q2. What is the educational qualification required for the MEDICAL OFFICER post?
faq.answer: Candidates must possess an MBBS degree recognized by MCI and be registered with MCI or a State Medical Council. Three years of working experience in a hospital attached to a Medical College or a Corporate Hospital is mandatory. A Post Graduate Medical degree is desirable.

faq.question: Q3. What is the age limit for the TISS MEDICAL OFFICER position?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for the MEDICAL OFFICER post is 55 years as of 31st March 2026. Age relaxation will be provided as per the prevailing government norms and regulations.

faq.question: Q4. What is the salary offered for the MEDICAL OFFICER role?
faq.answer: The selected candidate for the MEDICAL OFFICER position will receive a monthly salary ranging from Rs. 75,000 to Rs. 80,000.

faq.question: Q5. How many vacancies are available for the MEDICAL OFFICER post?
faq.answer: There is one vacancy available for the MEDICAL OFFICER position in the Tata Institute of Social Sciences (TISS) recruitment.

faq.question: Q6. What is the application fee for TISS MEDICAL OFFICER recruitment?
faq.answer: The application fee for General/OBC candidates is Rs. 1000/-. For SC/ST candidates, the fee is Rs. 250/-. Women candidates are exempted from paying any application fee.

faq.question: Q7. What is the selection process for the TISS MEDICAL OFFICER recruitment?
faq.answer: The selection process for the MEDICAL OFFICER post involves shortlisting of eligible candidates, followed by a personal interaction and document verification.

faq.question: Q8. Is this a permanent or contractual job?
faq.answer: The TISS MEDICAL OFFICER position is a contractual job, offering a fixed-term employment opportunity.

faq.question: Q9. Where is the TISS located?
faq.answer: The Tata Institute of Social Sciences (TISS) is located in Mumbai, Maharashtra.

faq.question: Q10. How can I apply for the TISS MEDICAL OFFICER recruitment?
faq.answer: Applications must be submitted online through the official TISS website or the direct application link provided in the 'Important Links' section on or before the last date of application.
